prose:
Method–provenance block
Property: Fukui functions f⁺ (electrophilic), f⁻ (nucleophilic), f⁰ (radical) and dual descriptor for formaldehyde (CH₂O) in the gas phase.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`), no density fitting, run in PySCF via chemkit.
Geometry provenance: single-point charges on the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz geometry; the structure was NOT re-optimized at DFT (DFT//fixed geometry protocol).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge and multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, multiplicity 1).   Cation state: charge +1, doublet; Anion state: charge −1, doublet.
Software + version: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (backend: PySCF 2.x; run through chemkit-engine CLI).
Convergence + caveats: All three SCF calculations (N, N+1, N–1) converged; integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true.  Engine checks note exact charge conservation for f⁺ and f⁻ (Σf ≈ 1.0000) and presence of the common header (see warnings below).  No other warnings reported.

Key numerical results (Mulliken-charge finite-difference Fukui indices, per atom):
  Atom 1  O:   f⁺ =  0.46813824   f⁻ = 0.46742464   f⁰ = 0.46778144   Δf =  0.00071359555
  Atom 2  C:   f⁺ =  0.70839130   f⁻ = 0.11244422   f⁰ = 0.41041776   Δf =  0.59594709
  Atom 3  H:   f⁺ = −0.088269392  f⁻ = 0.21007563   f⁰ = 0.060903121  Δf = −0.29834503
  Atom 4  H:   f⁺ = −0.088260145  f⁻ = 0.21005551   f⁰ = 0.060897683  Δf = −0.29831566

Most electrophilic site (highest f⁺):  Atom 2 (carbon) with f⁺ = 0.70839130.
Most nucleophilic site (highest f⁻):  Atom 1 (oxygen) with f⁻ = 0.46742464.

Reproducibility
CLI command executed (abbreviated):
  chemkit fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /…/formaldehyde.xyz --out …/live.json
Live .out log: a timestamped file named `fukui_<timestamp>.out` was streamed to the working directory while the job ran (it can be viewed with `tail -f`).
Result files: JSON at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp07rpzxnt/live.json ; bar-chart PNG at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/formaldehyde/argo_o3/20260704-153448_formaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_02_plot.png.
